---
applyTo: '**'
---

# WSB Work Plan Instructions

## CSV File Structure

Fill out the CSV file of WSB plan with the following columns:
- **Function/Screen**: Name of the screen or function
- **Type**: Type of component (Screen/Function)
- **Feature**: Main feature category
- **Sub Feature**: Sub-feature category
- **Function/Screen Description**: Detailed description
- **Level***: Complexity level (Simple, Medium, Complex)
- **Est. Effort**: Estimated effort in ideal person-days
- **Planned**: Iteration assignment (Iteration 1, Iteration 2, Iteration 3)
- **Status**: Current status (all set to "Planned")

## Effort Planning Guidelines

- **Total estimated effort**: ~180 person-days
- **Effort per iteration**: ~60 person-days each
- **Complexity levels**: Simple, Medium, Complex
- **Planning phases**: 3 iterations
- **Default status**: Planned

---

## WSB Functional Breakdown Structure

### 3.1 Authentication & User Profile

#### 3.1.1 Sign Up & Sign In
- 3.1.1.1 Screen/Function: Register Account
- 3.1.1.2 Screen/Function: OTP Verification
- 3.1.1.3 Screen/Function: Login
- 3.1.1.4 Screen/Function: Choose Role
- 3.1.1.5 Screen/Function: Forgot Password
- 3.1.1.6 Screen/Function: View Homepage

#### 3.1.2 Profile Management
- 3.1.2.1 Screen/Function: View User Profile
- 3.1.2.2 Screen/Function: Update User Profile
- 3.1.2.3 Screen/Function: Change Password
- 3.1.2.4 Screen/Function: View Notifications
- 3.1.2.5 Screen/Function: Personal Schedule

---

### 3.2 Class Management

#### 3.2.1 Class Administration
- 3.2.1.1 Screen/Function: Create Class
- 3.2.1.2 Screen/Function: Update Class
- 3.2.1.3 Screen/Function: Delete Class
- 3.2.1.4 Screen/Function: Create Comment

#### 3.2.2 Class Participation
- 3.2.2.1 Screen/Function: Search & Join Class
- 3.2.2.2 Screen/Function: Class Details

#### 3.2.3 Attendance & Scheduling
- 3.2.3.1 Screen/Function: View Class Schedule
- 3.2.3.2 Screen/Function: Create Class Schedule
- 3.2.3.3 Screen/Function: Update Class Schedule
- 3.2.3.4 Screen/Function: Take Attendance
- 3.2.3.5 Screen/Function: Edit Attendance

---

### 3.3 Course Content & Communication

#### 3.3.1 Posts & Comments
- 3.3.1.1 Screen/Function: View Class Post
- 3.3.1.2 Screen/Function: Create Post
- 3.3.1.3 Screen/Function: Update Post
- 3.3.1.4 Screen/Function: Create Comment
- 3.3.1.5 Screen/Function: Edit Comment
- 3.3.1.6 Screen/Function: Delete Comment

#### 3.3.2 Learning Class Materials
- 3.3.2.1 Screen/Function: View Material Management
- 3.3.2.2 Screen/Function: Upload Class Material
- 3.3.2.3 Screen/Function: Material Viewer (View & Download)
- 3.3.2.4 Screen/Function: Delete Class Material

#### 3.3.3 Virtual Meeting
- 3.3.3.1 Screen/Function: Virtual Classroom Integration

---

### 3.4 Assignments & Assessment

#### 3.4.1 Assignment Management
- 3.4.1.1 Screen/Function: Create Assignment Manually
- 3.4.1.2 Screen/Function: Create Assignment By Uploading File
  - 3.4.1.2.1 Original File Option
  - 3.4.1.2.2 Sentence Segmentation Option
- 3.4.1.3 Screen/Function: Create Assignment with AI
- 3.4.1.4 Screen/Function: Create Assignment by Resource Bank
- 3.4.1.5 Screen/Function: Assignment Details
- 3.4.1.6 Screen/Function: Update Assignment

#### 3.4.2 Submission & Grading
- 3.4.2.1 Screen/Function: Student Attempt
- 3.4.2.2 Screen/Function: Submit Assignment
- 3.4.2.3 Screen/Function: Grading Dashboard (View Submissions)
- 3.4.2.4 Screen/Function: Grading Essay (Manual & AI Support)

#### 3.4.3 Analytics & Results
- 3.4.3.1 Screen/Function: Student Gradebook
- 3.4.3.2 Screen/Function: Class Analytics Dashboard

---

### 3.5 Resource Bank Management

#### 3.5.1 Bank Operations
- 3.5.1.1 Screen/Function: Resource Bank List
- 3.5.1.2 Screen/Function: Resource Bank Detail
- 3.5.1.3 Screen/Function: Create Resource Bank

#### 3.5.2 Question Management
- 3.5.2.1 Screen/Function: Question Editor (Manual & Import)

  - 3.5.2.1.3 Screen/Function: Update Question in Resource Bank

### 3.6 Administration & Subscription
